feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable pass ODN number in reference field in accounting document.
entry.content:
Dear Member ,

we have created condition contract , we have generated settlement document after executing T- code WB2R_SC , credit memo is generated , Now settlement document number is passing as reference number in accounting .

we have to pass OND number in reference number in  accounting document .  

what configuration need to pass ODN number after settlement of condition contract .

Kindly suggest .

Thanks & Regards ,

Shital

entry.title: Handling Import Tariffs on Steel Products in SAP (USA – March 2024)
entry.content:
The U.S. government has announced that new import tariffs on steel products will take effect starting March 12, 2024. Some of the products exported by our company may be affected, and we need to understand how to handle these tariffs within SAP. We're shipping from Germany to a customer in the US. Occasionally, we also ship to one of our own plants in the US. We're not using GTS.

We are looking for best practices or relevant SAP functionalities to manage import duties effectively. Specifically, we would like to know:

  • How to configure import tariffs/customs duties in SAP (e.g., in SAP SD, MM)?
  • Whether there are OSS Notes or SAP recommendations regarding this topic?
  • How similar cases have been handled in S/4HANA?

If anyone has experience dealing with U.S. import duties in SAP, your insights would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Pre-delivered templates not available in App ''Maintain Email Templates'
entry.content:
When calling the app 'Maintain Email Templates', in the pre-delivered tab, we cannot find the following templates for the quotation management:

  • New approval request: SD_SLS_QTN_APPROVAL_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Approval reminder: SD_SLS_QTN_DEADLINE_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Document release: SD_SLS_QTN_RELEASE_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Document rejection: SD_SLS_QTN_REJECT_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Document rework request: SD_SLS_QTN_REWORK_EMAIL_TMPL

Is there a way to upload them? Should we create them from scratch via SE80?

entry.title: Unable to create BP
entry.content: Hi,, I cant see my defined value in Grouping while trying to create new BP(org). I have configured the number ranges(account group, and BP group ) and still cant see my grouping value in BP creation window. Can some one please help.

entry.title: Subcontracting to a subcontractor as a production order external operation
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have below scenario in MTO

Sales order is created, from which we have created a production order where we have one production operation ( external ) to send the semi finished material to a subcontractor, where a subcontractor will perform an operation and send that material to a customer directly .

Here ,do we need to maintain subcontractor as a storage location ? And from this operation, do we need to create a purchase requisition , followed by a po to capture the cost ? Will be thankful if someone can shed the light .

entry.title: Missing functionality in SAP note : 955860 - Invoice correction process with return movement (PL&HU)
entry.content:
Hello, 

The SAP Note 955860 cannot be applied in the public cloud environment, as it requires the creation of a new sales document type (RERK), which is not supported.

We are implementing a Public Cloud solution for a company operating in Poland, and therefore this legal requirement must be addressed. Could you provide alternative solutions or recommendations ? 

Thank you in advance,

Regards, 

Eva

entry.title: Custom routine for pricing procedure not performing calculation
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I am doing some experimentation and trying to create a custom routine. I am not familiar with the process and running into some problems at the moment. In my code below, I am trying to give a user a discount if in the current month they have more than 3 orders over the value of 3000. I see some people use "komp" in their code, but what is this and how can it be implemented in my scenario? Can someone please shed some light as to where I am going wrong?

DATA: lv_order_count        TYPE i,
      lv_total_value        TYPE decimal10_2,
      lv_discount           TYPE decimal10_2,
      lv_discounted_value   TYPE decimal10_2,
      lt_vbak               TYPE TABLE OF vbak,
      ls_vbak               TYPE vbak,
      lv_first_day_of_month TYPE sy-datum.

lv_first_day_of_month = sy-datum(6) && '01'.

SELECT * FROM vbak INTO TABLE lt_vbak
   WHERE erdat BETWEEN lv_first_day_of_month AND sy-datum and netwr > 3000 AND kunnr = '1987653'.

lv_order_count = LINES( lt_vbak ).

 LOOP AT lt_vbak INTO ls_vbak.
    IF lv_order_count > 3.
      lv_discount = ls_vbak-netwr * '0.03'.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

entry.title: How to include Project System in Make-to-Stock process in Public cloud?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I am currently working with a client who wishes to integrate Project System into the Make-to-Stock process. As I have not yet had experience with this specific scenario, I would greatly appreciate your guidance on the process.

Your insights and support would be extremely valuable to me.

Thank you in advance for your help.

Best regards,

entry.title: How to include Project System in Make-to-Stock process in Public cloud system?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I am currently working with a client who wishes to integrate Project System into the Make-to-Stock process. As I have not yet had experience with this specific scenario, I would greatly appreciate your guidance on the process.

Your insights and support would be extremely valuable to me.

Thank you in advance for your help.

Best regards,
Souhardhya Sen

entry.title: Can someone help me on how to activate batch strategy on storage location
entry.content: SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Price Condition Showing Incorrect Value in SAP
entry.content:
Hello,

The price condition is not displaying the price I created; instead, it shows a different one. Any ideas on what could be causing this?

Thanks!

entry.title: how to create sales order for available stock of material, partial from stock and partial from MTO.
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have 100 qty stock for a material, i want to create a sales order of 50 qty MTO and 50 qty MTS. without maintaining 2-line item for same material. 

please suggest me the steps.

entry.title: SD Pricing
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

I have an issue regarding the calculation of the conditiion basis value for a manual discount ZD00 at item level for an item.

Here is the scenario:

A customer bought 105 pieces of a product. A manual discount of 6% is offered.

In my sales order,  in line item 10, i have maintained a manual condition (ZAPR) which is the price of the item. The manual price is 59,48 euro.

Total price of item: 59,48 * 105 =6.245,40 

Then i have added a manual discount (ZD00) of 6% which gives me 374,72 eur. This is calculated from the total price.

Then i have created a proforma invoice for line item 10. When i checked the condition price at item level, i see that the discount is doubled. 

It seems that the discount has been calculated by added the value 6.245,51 euro of an inactive condition type ZRFP which is a rebate factor with the value of the ZAPR price which is 6245,40 euro in the condition basis. Based on the condition basis, this discount has been calculated.

This discount is not correct and does not reflect the discount in the sales order.

Could you please tell me why the system has added the value of the rebate factor which that of the ZAPR price to calculated the discount in the proforma invoice?

@Lakshmipathi 

@rob_ariaans

entry.title: Which block to consider for customer Central block, deletion flag, or Sales or cocd level block?
entry.content: I am doing a de-duplication project for a client. The client wants to block the duplicates in a certain way that the duplicate customers cant be edited, nor can it be used in a sales order or any relevant docs. What block do I set in this case?

entry.title: Regarding multiple shipping address in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to maintain multiple shipping address for a customer in public cloud, and while creating sales order it should ask which shipping address to be used (ship to party).

so i have activated  

1. Activate Multiple address handling for customer master data in SAP BP.

2. Activate Multiple address handling in SD Documents using SAP BP:

But after activating it i have created a sales order but when trying to maintain taxes, I cant see all access sequence, only tax classification access sequence is there, I have checked the configuration in that access sequence is already maintain for the taxes, please tell what will be the issue.

entry.title: Prevent Trasnsfer from MSEG-SGTXT to Accounting Document during MIGO
entry.content:
Currently we're populating each MIGO line item (MSEG-SGTXT) with a unique value from our external WM application (non-SAP).

When the subsequent Accounting Document is generated, this value is copied through and prevents G/L account summarization during FI posting.

The ask to is to simply NOT transfer the value from the Material Document (MSEG-SGTXT) to the Accounting Document while keeping the value in the Material Document intact.

entry.title: Old SO being change price to 0
entry.content:
Dear team,

I have problem that:

i have Pricing condition A: amount without scale 200$ valid from 01.01.2024 to 31.12.2024, but i have update it with wrong value: amount 0$, scale quantity 200 same validity.

The pricing has alreay overwrite back to before change.

there’re around 300 old SO having billing date in 2024, in item condition, pricing condition A being effect that it change to 0 amount automatically if ATP check re-run or ME22N change.

Do we have any way to stop old sale order item condition change to 0?

entry.title: Consignment Scheduling Agreements with Self Billing for Automotive?
entry.content:
We are implementing S/4HANA Private Cloud and have a major Automotive Supplier Tier 1 that we need to support Consignment Scheduling Agreements with Self-Billing.  Customer locations in Germany, Hungary, and USA.  Assumption is Self-Billing with Automatic Posting (SBWAP).

It is regular consignment, no third party warehouse external agent.

We receive EDI EDIFACT message types DELFOR, INVRPT, INVOIC (SBI).

Is there a process document more detailed than 4LZ and 4H2 that combines the processes? Configuration guide?  I assume it is Scheduling Agreement (SA) type LK with delivery to do consignment fill up.  Then an ED sales order with reference to the SA for consignment Issue.

Can we trigger the ED Sales order from the INVRPT message or does it have to be manually created?  Thanks for any help.

entry.title: As a SAP MM Functional user, how can I learn the AI part of SAP. What should I learn?
entry.content: I am a SAP MM Functional Consultant. To keep up with the changing dynamics, I want to learn AI with SAP. Any experienced consultant, please provide me a clear roadmap of what to learn and what all resources available both free and paid that I can deep dive into to get a good grasp on AI in SAP. Please assist me.

entry.title: Hi Guru's Help me on periodic billing plan Item net value 5000, can we split 48 months in Sales cont
entry.content:
In Sales contract: Periodic billing plan

For example item net value - 5000 ÷48 months= 104.16

5000÷24 months= 208.3

5000÷36 months= 138.8

Business wants  to show item net value and billing plan must be same.

Can we split into 2years (24 months), 3years (36 months), 4years ( 48 months)

If yes, pl. help me with configuration settings.
